In 1972 a former lawyer named Leo Melamed was clever enough to see a business in this and launched currency futures on the Chicago Mercantile Exchange.
Cast: Lake Bell, Demetri Martin, Rob Corddry, Michaela Watkins, Ken Marino, Fred Melamed.
Mr Melamed also saw that selling the future price of dollars was much like selling the future price of pork bellies.
Leo Melamed, a Jewish immigrant from Poland, took control in 1969 and introduced currency futures and the International Monetary Market to the exchange.
